2022May 16, 2022

Virtual

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Virtual, May 16, 2022 -- May 20, 2022

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2022-05-virtual

18 Resolutions

1100Plenary
Establish liaison to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 41 and nominate representatives
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 establishes a liaison to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 41.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1099Plenary
Establish a TR for the reference model for industrial data
SC 4 establishes a TR for the reference model for industrial data.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1098Plenary
Call for experts to join AG 2 Implementation Forum
SC 4 recognizes the value of the Implementation Forum and the rich discussion regarding digital twins.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1097Plenary
Change target dates for ISO/CD 10303-239 ed3 to SDT 36
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO/CS to move ISO 10303-239 ed3 (project id = 78832) from SDT 24 to SDT 36 with the following target dates: * Stage 40 -- DIS Registered: 2022-1...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1096Plenary
Modify ISO 10303-1819 designation from IS to TS
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO/CS and modify ISO 10303-1819 from IS to TS in the ISO Project Portal and continue with its incorporation into SMRL V9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1095Plenary
Incorporate ISO/TS 10303-4000 into the SMRL database
SC 4 requests that ISO/CS incorporate ISO 10303-4000 into the SMRL covered by the procedures for managing standards in database format and the standing document SC4N2591 and launch edition 2 noting...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1094Plenary
Update the ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Handbook standing documents
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager submit ISO/TC 184/SC 4/PPC N201, ISO/TC 184/SC 4/N 3492, and ISO/TC 184/SC 4/N 3619 for a Committee Internal Ballot of eight weeks duration for approval as stand...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1093Plenary
Identify experts in support of ISO 16792 and ISO/TC 10 Liaison
SC 4 nominates Atsuto Soma, Tom Thurman, Keith Hunten, Leo van Ruijven, Mikael Hedlind, Pierre Duchier and Allison Barnard Feeney as experts from ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1092Plenary
Establish liaison to ISO/TC 85 and appoint representative
SC 4 welcomes this fruitful discussion and proposes to ISO/TC 85 to prepare a future coordination on development and implementation of standards in establishing a liaison from ISO/TC 184/SC 4 to IS...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1091Plenary
Appoint Convenor for TF1 ISO 10303 SMRL architecture innovation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1090Plenary
Establish 8-week ballot duration for new work item proposals
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to apply the 8-week ballot duration to the following NP ballots: |=== |Project |Approval |Framework for Nuclear Digital Ecosystem (NDE) |☒ |ISO 8000-1 ed3, Data ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1089Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects
SC 4 approves the following Project Leaders and Project Editors for the listed Projects noted: |=== |Project |Working Group |Project Leader/Editor |ISO 10303-2 (ID 81196) |WG 12 |Stuart Galt (Leade...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons and reports provided to the 83rd Plenary.

Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to participants and presenters of the Open Technical Forum, Implementation Forum, and Change Management Committee during the pre-plenary week of activities.

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
